title: Diversa Aquarium with LED Lid - Professional Fish Tank - Real Glass, AQUARIUM WITH LED LID (200 Litre (100x40x50cm))
features: Experience superior Aquatic Bliss with Diversa - For over 40 years, our trusted brand has delivered excellence. Our premium glass aquariums, crafted with Float Guardian Glass, offer enduring durability and unmatched clarity for passionate aquatic enthusiasts.
Enhanced safety - The 8 mm glass thickness enhances the tank's safety and stability, providing a secure environment for your aquatic pets.

Energy-efficient Brilliance - Illuminate your aquarium with our 20W LED light, delivering a radiant 2550 lumens for vibrant aquatic life. It's not just bright—it's also remarkably energy-efficient, making it perfect for your plants.
Free aquarium mat - As an added bonus, the aquarium arrives with a FREE Aquarium mat for extra protection, ensuring the tank's surface remains scratch-free and well-maintained.
Specification - Length 100 cm, Width 40 cm, Height 56 cm, Volume 200 Litre, Glass Thickness 8 mm, LED light 20W 2550Lm 6500K
description: Elevate Your Space with Diversa Aquarium Elevate your aquatic experience with the Diversa Aquarium Fish Tank, a premium addition to your home or office. This listing is exclusively for the aquarium itself, catering to those who seek exceptional quality and design for their aquatic setups. For a comprehensive selection of Diversa products, including aquarium covers, cabinets, and other high-quality fish tank accessories, please explore Diversa Brand on Amazon. Crafted with Precision and Safety Invest in excellence with Diversa. Our aquariums feature float Guardian glass, known for exceptional transparency and durability. Built to European safety norms, these tanks have double silicone joints and safe, smooth edges for maximum safety. Brilliant Illumination with LED Lid Transform your aquatic world with our LED lid, offering aesthetic brilliance and optimal lighting. This energy-efficient lighting enhances aquatic colors and plant growth, creating a stunning underwater landscape. Specifications That Excel Diversa products excel in form and function, providing a suitable habitat for your aquatic companions while enhancing your living or working space. Specifications: Aquarium Dimensions: L: 100 cm, W: 40 cm, H: 50 cm Total Set Height with lid: 56cm Volume: 200 Liters Glass Thickness: 8 mm Light: 20W, 2550Lm, 6500K 2-Year Warranty
